cache.source_policy: Compact seed cache for UI verification when live FRED fetch is unavailable in CI. Replace with refreshed FRED CSV cache before production-grade analysis.

doctrine.primary_rule: Render raw dataset first; annotations are analytic overlays, not replacements.
doctrine.interpretation_rule: Text interpretation is secondary to direct data and must not hide missing evidence.
doctrine.annotation_rule: Historical annotations must be suppressed when the chart dataset does not cover the set point.

primary_question: Is capital being paid to wait, or is capital being forced out on the risk curve?

tbill_3m_yield.label: 3-month T-bill yield
tbill_3m_yield.raw_series_policy: Render the series directly; use annotations as overlays, not substitutes.

cpi_inflation.label: CPI inflation index
cpi_inflation.raw_series_policy: Render the series directly; use annotations as overlays, not substitutes.

effective_fed_funds.label: Effective fed funds rate
effective_fed_funds.raw_series_policy: Render the series directly; use annotations as overlays, not substitutes.

cpi_yoy.label: CPI YoY
cpi_yoy.method: Year-over-year CPI change using nearest prior observation within 55 days.

real_cash_yield.label: 3M T-bill yield minus CPI YoY
real_cash_yield.method: 3M T-bill yield minus CPI YoY, with CPI YoY carried forward to the T-bill observation date.

real_fed_funds.label: Effective fed funds minus CPI YoY
real_fed_funds.method: Effective fed funds minus CPI YoY, with CPI YoY carried forward to the fed-funds observation date.

money_cash_main.title: 3M T-bill yield vs CPI YoY vs real cash yield

annotation_spec.policy: Annotate generously only when the chart dataset covers the event or regime window. If the series does not reach the set point, suppress the annotation and record the omission.

money_cash_main.label: 1979-1982 Volcker tightening
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Reference for high real rates, inflation suppression, valuation compression, and cash competing with risk.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

money_cash_main.label: 1994 bond shock
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Reference for surprise tightening and duration repricing without a full economic collapse.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

money_cash_main.label: 2007-2009 global financial crisis
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Reference for credit collapse, liquidity demand, duration safety, equity drawdown, and policy rescue.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

money_cash_main.label: 2009-2015 QE / low-rate repair regime
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Reference for low cash return, liquidity support, financial repression, and long-duration asset support.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

money_cash_main.label: 2018 late-cycle tightening / Q4 risk shock
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Reference for late-cycle tightening, balance-sheet runoff sensitivity, and valuation stress.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

money_cash_main.label: 2020 COVID liquidity shock
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Reference for sudden stop, emergency easing, liquidity flood, and cross-asset dislocation.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

money_cash_main.label: 2021 zero-rate liquidity / speculative boom
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Reference for zero cash yield, abundant liquidity, high speculation, and long-duration multiple expansion.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

money_cash_main.label: 2022 inflation / hiking shock
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Reference for rate shock, long-duration valuation reset, dollar strength, and cash yield revival.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

money_cash_main.label: 2023 regional-bank stress
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Reference for deposit flight, bank balance-sheet duration stress, and policy liquidity backstop.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

money_cash_main.label: 2016-2021 cloud / SaaS multiple expansion
money_cash_main.why_it_matters: Analog for low-rate support of recurring-revenue long-duration equities and subsequent sensitivity to rate repricing.
money_cash_main.render_hint: regime band with range values and current comparison

web_summary.annotation_policy: Show raw data first. Overlay data-backed historical set points. Keep interpretation secondary.
web_summary.inference: Annotation-only workbench generated from cache-backed chart data. Refresh source cache before production-grade analysis.
web_summary.historical_narrative: Historical comparisons are data-backed set points, not causal claims by themselves.
web_summary.portfolio_implication: Use Money / Cash as one input in the Macro spine.

missing_evidence: Treasury bill supply is declared in Mission 3 but not implemented in this first generator.
Stablecoin supply is Phase 2 and requires a crypto liquidity provider.
Money-market assets, bank reserves, M2, financial conditions, TGA, reverse repo, and SOFR remain pending in the cache-backed first visual pass.
Seed cache is compact and must be replaced by live FRED refresh before production-grade analysis.

analysis.cycle_state: cash does not preserve purchasing power
missing: Treasury bill supply is declared in Mission 3 but not implemented in this first generator.
Stablecoin supply is Phase 2 and requires a crypto liquidity provider.
Money-market assets, bank reserves, M2, financial conditions, TGA, reverse repo, and SOFR remain pending in the cache-backed first visual pass.
Seed cache is compact and must be replaced by live FRED refresh before production-grade analysis.
analysis.ontological_landscape_read: Raw Money / Cash chart artifact generated from cache. Use chart annotations to compare current readings with historical regimes.
analysis.historical_cycle_narrative: Historical comparisons are data-backed set points, not causal claims by themselves.
analysis.portfolio_implication: Preserve optionality until the rest of the Core Macro Spine confirms.

derivation_notes: CPI YoY is calendar-year based, not fixed-row-count based.
Real cash yield and real fed funds use carry-forward CPI YoY alignment.
limitations: Compact seed cache is for visual verification only.
Live FRED refresh should replace this cache before production-grade analysis.
Homepage build reads cache rather than fetching FRED live.
generator.annotation_policy: Annotate every relevant historical set point that is backed by the chart dataset; suppress unsupported set points rather than hallucinating values.
